raw_consumer_statement:
RE : White Chocolate Grill Fraud Charges To Whom it XXXX concern : I have requested Citi Card STOP payment to XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, XXXX. Citi card did NOTHING to investigate. The merchant has been nonresponsive to me and to Citi card. Citi card didn't even ask them to provide proof of a receipt. I have reached out to the BBB and the merchant didn't respond to them either. 

My citi card ends in XXXX and my address is : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, AZ XXXX I can be reached at : XXXX to verify my account. 
-- -- Here is a summary of what happened and was requested of Citi XXXX. 

We visited XXXX XXXX XXXX on XXXX on XX/XX/year>. The reservation was under XXXX for XXXX. Our order was as follows : XXXX shrimp XXXX app XXXX egg roll app XXXX fish meal that was dry and terrible and the server agreed to comp the meal XXXX other entre XXXX glass of champagne XXXX espresso martini XXXX mules XXXX other drinks I think they were XXXX gimlets XXXX desserts We saw a charge of {$340.00} on our account and have since asked for the receipt multiple times. The restaurant refuses to provide us with a receipt and can not provide proof our meal was {$340.00}, especially with the comped entre. We believe that our check was changed or fraudulently altered. As no one will call us back with a receipt email or text it we have no faith that the charge is accurate and it seems highly inflated. We are asking Citi to please stop payment on {$85.00} of this total bill as we have no receipt and the restaurant will not provide XXXX. 

Please stop payment on {$85.00} of the {$340.00} charge until the receipt is provided. 
Thank you. 


XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, XXXX
